Part.Source:
Event Start
&CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Nao &CteImpVlrTotTri.enabled = False
&CteImpVlr.Enabled = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
&CtePosPre.TooltipText = "Possui componentes do valor da prestação?" &CteImpVlrTotTri.Visible = False GridPrestacao_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridPrestacao.InternalName GridPrestacao.Rows = Page.Rows &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage = 1 &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPrestacaoPageCount = -1 GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridPrestacao.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridPrestacaoPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPrestacao.Load
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CtePreCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &GridCtePreCod = CtePreCod &GridCteNomPreCom = CteNomPreCom &GridCteVlrPreCom = CteVlrPreCom &GridCteDesIcmsCom = CteDesIcmsCom &GridCtePrePagCom = CtePrePagCom
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Load
EndFor
EndEvent
Event GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage -= 1 GridPrestacao.PreviousPage() Case GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage += 1 GridPrestacao.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridPrestacao.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridPrestacao.Rows = GridPrestacaoPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridPrestacaoCurrentPage = 1 GridPrestacao.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
Do case Case &CteVlrTotPreSer = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento msg('ATENÇÃO! Valores da prestação não pode ser igual a zero. Verifique!') Case (&CteVlrRecSer > &CteVlrTotPreSer) and &CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Sim msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Valor a receber deve ser menor ou igual a valor da prestação. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) OtherWise
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPCte(!'ValorImp', !'Modal', false) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndCase
EndEvent
Event 'WizardPrevious'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WPCte(!'ValorImp', !'Carga', true)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
if 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &CteImpVlrTotTri = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrTotTri &CteImpTriVlrPis = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrPis &CteImpTriVlrCofins = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCofins &CteImpTriAliInss = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriAliInss &CteImpTriVlrInss = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrInss &CteImpTriVlrCsll = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCsll &CteImpTriVlrIr = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrIr &CteImpAliTotTri = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliTotTri &CteImpAli = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAli &CteImpVlr = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlr &CteImpVbc = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbc &CteImpPerRed = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpPerRed &CteImpAliRet = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliRet &CteImpVbcRet = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbcRet &CteImpVstRet = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVstRet &CteImpVlrCre = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrCre &CteCfop = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteCfop &ImpCfoNom = &WizardData.ValorImp.ImpCfoNom &CtePosPre = &WizardData.ValorImp.CtePosPre &CteImpCst = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpCst &CteVlrTotPreSer = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrTotPreSer &CteVlrRecSer = &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrRecSer &IsGeraDuplicatas = &WizardData.ValorImp.IsGeraDuplicatas
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Geral.FilCod &CteCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteCod Do 'load' EndIf
if &CteCod.IsEmpty() wwCTE.Link() Endif
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrTotTri = &CteImpVlrTotTri &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrPis = &CteImpTriVlrPis &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCofins = &CteImpTriVlrCofins &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriAliInss = &CteImpTriAliInss &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrInss = &CteImpTriVlrInss &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrCsll = &CteImpTriVlrCsll &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpTriVlrIr = &CteImpTriVlrIr &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliTotTri = &CteImpAliTotTri &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAli = &CteImpAli &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlr = &CteImpVlr &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbc = &CteImpVbc &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpPerRed = &CteImpPerRed &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpAliRet = &CteImpAliRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVbcRet = &CteImpVbcRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVstRet = &CteImpVstRet &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpVlrCre = &CteImpVlrCre &WizardData.ValorImp.CteCfop = &CteCfop &WizardData.ValorImp.ImpCfoNom = &ImpCfoNom &WizardData.ValorImp.CtePosPre = &CtePosPre &WizardData.ValorImp.CteImpCst = &CteImpCst &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrTotPreSer = &CteVlrTotPreSer &WizardData.ValorImp.CteVlrRecSer = &CteVlrRecSer &WizardData.ValorImp.IsGeraDuplicatas = &IsGeraDuplicatas &WizardData.ValorImp.GridPrestacao.Clear() For Each Line in GridPrestacao &GridPrestacaoItem = new() &GridPrestacaoItem.GridCtePreCod = &GridCtePreCod &GridPrestacaoItem.GridCteNomPreCom = &GridCteNomPreCom &GridPrestacaoItem.GridCteVlrPreCom = &GridCteVlrPreCom &GridPrestacaoItem.GridCteDesIcmsCom = &GridCteDesIcmsCom &GridPrestacaoItem.GridCtePrePagCom = &GridCtePrePagCom
&WizardData.ValorImp.GridPrestacao.Add(&GridPrestacaoItem) EndFor &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.EmpCod &WizardData.Modal.DupCreVlrDup = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.DupCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.DinCreVlrDup = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.DinCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.CarCreVlrDup = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CarCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.CarDebVlrDup = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CarDebVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.Diferenca = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.Diferenca &WizardData.Modal.CteVlrRecSer = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteVlrRecSer &WizardData.Modal.TotalMoeda = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.TotalMoeda &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodTaf = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteModRodTaf &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodNroRegEst = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteModRodNroRegEst &WizardData.Modal.CteTipFrt = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteTipFrt &WizardData.Modal.CteDtaHorVia = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteDtaHorVia &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodRNTRC = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteModRodRNTRC &WizardData.Modal.CtePosDup = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CtePosDup &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodCol = &EmptyWizardData.Modal.CteModRodCol &WizardData.Modal.GridColetas.Clear() &WizardData.Modal.GridDuplicata.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando &PadObs = &CteImpAliTotTri.ToFormattedString() PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPCTEVALORIMP', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) GravaValorImposto.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteVlrRecSer,&CteVlrTotPreSer,&CtePosPre,&CteCfop,&ImpCfoNom,&CteImpCst,&CteImpPerRed,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpVlrCre,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet,&CteImpAliTotTri,&CteImpTriVlrPis,&CteImpTriVlrCofins,&CteImpTriVlrCsll,&CteImpTriAliInss,&CteImpTriVlrIr,&IsGeraDuplicatas) RetornaImpostoCte.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteImpCst,&CteImpVlr,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet, &CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Event &CteCfop.IsValid
Do 'GetCFOP'
EndEvent
Event &CtePosPre.Click
If &CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Sim CtePrestaDefault.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,'S') GXUITabsPanel_TAB.ShowTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TAB.SelectTab(2) Else GXUITabsPanel_TAB.HideTab(2) CtePrestaDefault.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,'N') GXUITabsPanel_TAB.SelectTab(1) EndIf GridPrestacao.Refresh()
EndEvent
Event &GridCteVlrPreCom.IsValid
Do 'atualizaGrid'
EndEvent
Event &GridCteDesIcmsCom.IsValid
Do 'atualizaGrid'
EndEvent
Event &CteVlrTotPreSer.IsValid
If &CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Nao &CteVlrRecSer = &CteVlrTotPreSer EndIf do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpCst.IsValid
Do 'validaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpAli.IsValid
do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpTriAliInss.IsValid
do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpVbc.IsValid
do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpAliRet.IsValid
If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando If &CteVlrTotPreSer = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Valores da prestação não pode ser igual a zero. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) Else GravaValorImposto.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteVlrRecSer,&CteVlrTotPreSer,&CtePosPre,&CteCfop,&ImpCfoNom,&CteImpCst,&CteImpPerRed,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpVlrCre,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet,&CteImpAliTotTri,&CteImpTriVlrPis,&CteImpTriVlrCofins,&CteImpTriVlrCsll,&CteImpTriAliInss,&CteImpTriVlrIr,&IsGeraDuplicatas) If &CtePosPre =Status_SimNao.Sim &CteVlrRecSer = RetornaValorComponente.udp(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod) EndIf RetornaImpostoCte.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteImpCst,&CteImpVlr,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet, &CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteImpVbcRet.IsValid
If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando If &CteVlrTotPreSer = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Valores da prestação não pode ser igual a zero. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) Else GravaValorImposto.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteVlrRecSer,&CteVlrTotPreSer,&CtePosPre,&CteCfop,&ImpCfoNom,&CteImpCst,&CteImpPerRed,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpVlrCre,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet,&CteImpAliTotTri,&CteImpTriVlrPis,&CteImpTriVlrCofins,&CteImpTriVlrCsll,&CteImpTriAliInss,&CteImpTriVlrIr,&IsGeraDuplicatas) If &CtePosPre =Status_SimNao.Sim &CteVlrRecSer = RetornaValorComponente.udp(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod) EndIf RetornaImpostoCte.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteImpCst,&CteImpVlr,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet, &CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CteImpPerRed.IsValid
do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &CteImpVlrCre.IsValid
do 'atualizaImposto'
EndEvent
Event &GridCtePrePagCom.IsValid
Do 'atualizaGrid'
EndEvent
Sub 'atualizaImposto'
If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando If &CteVlrTotPreSer = 0 and &CteFinEms <> FinalidadeCte.Complemento msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Valores da prestação não pode ser igual a zero. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) Else GravaValorImposto.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteVlrRecSer,&CteVlrTotPreSer,&CtePosPre,&CteCfop,&ImpCfoNom,&CteImpCst,&CteImpPerRed,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpVlrCre,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet,&CteImpAliTotTri,&CteImpTriVlrPis,&CteImpTriVlrCofins,&CteImpTriVlrCsll,&CteImpTriAliInss,&CteImpTriVlrIr,&IsGeraDuplicatas) RetornaImpostoCte.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteImpCst,&CteImpVlr,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet, &CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'atualizaGrid'
If &CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando AtualizaPrestacaoCte.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&GridCteVlrPreCom,&GridCteNomPreCom,&GridCtePreCod,&GridCteDesIcmsCom, &GridCtePrePagCom) If &CtePosPre =Status_SimNao.Sim &CteVlrRecSer = RetornaValorComponente.udp(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod) EndIf GravaValorImposto.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteVlrRecSer,&CteVlrTotPreSer,&CtePosPre,&CteCfop,&ImpCfoNom,&CteImpCst,&CteImpPerRed,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpVlrCre,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet,&CteImpAliTotTri,&CteImpTriVlrPis,&CteImpTriVlrCofins,&CteImpTriVlrCsll,&CteImpTriAliInss,&CteImpTriVlrIr,&IsGeraDuplicatas) RetornaImpostoCte.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CteImpCst,&CteImpVlr,&CteImpVbc,&CteImpAli,&CteImpVstRet,&CteImpVbcRet,&CteImpAliRet, &CteImpTriVlrInss) EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'GetCFOP'
&AuxCfop = retornasoNumeros.Udp(&CteCfop) &CteCfop = trim(SubStr(&AuxCfop,1,1))+'.'+trim(SubStr(&AuxCfop,2,3)) For each order CfoCod Where CfoCod = &CteCfop
If CfoInd <> tipoCfop.Transporte msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Atenção", 'CFOP não recomendado para operação de transporte. Verifique!' ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) EndIf
&ImpCfoNom = substr(trim(CfoNom),1,60) Exit When none msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'CFOP Não encontrado verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CteCfop.SetFocus() EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'load'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
If CteFinEms = finalidadeCte.Complemento &CteImpVbc.Enabled = True Else &CteImpVbc.Enabled = False EndiF
&CteSts = CteSts &CteVlrTotPreSer = CteVlrTotPreSer &CtePosPre = CtePosPre &CteVlrRecSer = CteVlrRecSer &CteCfop = CteCfop &ImpCfoNom = CteNatOpe &CteFinEms = CteFinEms &CteImpCst = CteImpCst &CteImpAli = CteImpAli &CteImpPerRed = CteImpPerRed &CteImpVbc = CteImpVbc &CteImpVlr = CteImpVlr &CteImpVlrCre = CteImpVlrCre // &CteImpAliTotTri = CteImpAliTotTri &CteImpAliRet = CteImpAliRet &CteImpVbcRet = CteImpVbcRet &CteImpVstRet = CteImpVstRet
&CteImpTriVlrPis = CteImpTriVlrPis &CteImpTriVlrCofins = CteImpTriVlrCofins &CteImpTriVlrCsll = CteImpTriVlrCsll &CteImpTriVlrInss = CteImpTriVlrInss &CteImpTriAliInss = CteImpTriAliInss &CteImpTriVlrIr = CteImpTriVlrIr
Do 'validaImposto'
If &CtePosPre = Status_SimNao.Sim GXUITabsPanel_TAB.ShowTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TAB.SelectTab(2) Else GXUITabsPanel_TAB.HideTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TAB.SelectTab(1) EndIf
If CteSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando RetornaConfSistema.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon175_GerarDuplicatas, &CfgVlr)
If Trim(&CfgVlr) <> 'S' AND CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim &IsGeraDuplicatas = True Else &IsGeraDuplicatas = iif(trim(&CfgVlr) = 'S',True,False) EndIf EndIf
Exit EndFor
PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WPCTEVALORIMP', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &CteImpAliTotTri = VAL(TRIM(&PadObs))
EndSub
Sub 'validaImposto'
If &CteFinEms = finalidadeCte.Complemento &CteImpVbc.Enabled = True Else &CteImpVbc.Enabled = False EndiF
Do case Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Isento or &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.NaoTributada or &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Deferido or &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Simples &CteImpAli.Visible = False &CteImpVlr.Visible = False &CteImpVbc.Visible = False &CteImpPerRed.Visible = False &CteImpAliRet.Visible = False &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = False &CteImpVstRet.Visible = False &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = False
Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Outros &CteImpAli.Visible = True &CteImpVlr.Visible = True &CteImpVbc.Visible = True &CteImpPerRed.Visible = True &CteImpAliRet.Visible = False &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = False &CteImpVstRet.Visible = False &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = True
Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.OutraUF &CteImpAli.Visible = True &CteImpVlr.Visible = True &CteImpVbc.Visible = True &CteImpPerRed.Visible = False &CteImpAliRet.Visible = False &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = False &CteImpVstRet.Visible = False &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = False
Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Normal &CteImpAli.Visible = True &CteImpVlr.Visible = True &CteImpVbc.Visible = True &CteImpPerRed.Visible = False &CteImpAliRet.Visible = False &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = False &CteImpVstRet.Visible = False &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = False
Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Substituicao &CteImpAli.Visible = False &CteImpVlr.Visible = False &CteImpVbc.Visible = False &CteImpPerRed.Visible = False &CteImpAliRet.Visible = True &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = True &CteImpVstRet.Visible = True &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = True
Case &CteImpCst = ClassificacaoCst.Reduzida
&CteImpAli.Visible = True &CteImpVlr.Visible = True &CteImpVbc.Visible = True &CteImpPerRed.Visible = True &CteImpAliRet.Visible = False &CteImpVbcRet.Visible = False &CteImpVstRet.Visible = False &CteImpVlrCre.Visible = False EndCase &CteImpVlr.Enabled = False
EndSub
